title: Accounts cum Admin
description:
Job Description & Requirements

Accounts & Administrative Executive

📍 East / North Area | 🇲🇾 Malaysians Welcome

We are looking for a responsible and detail-oriented Accounts & Administrative Executive to support our daily accounting and administrative operations.

Key Responsibilities

  • Follow up on outstanding invoices and assist in preparing supplier payment reports

  • Maintain accurate records of customer payments and receipts

  • Prepare commission claim reports for Sales Designers

  • Ensure proper filing and documentation of supplier invoices, sales projects, and payment records

  • Assist with basic accounting and bookkeeping tasks

  • Handle general administrative duties such as filing, data entry, and record maintenance

  • Perform other ad-hoc administrative tasks as assigned

Requirements

  • Minimum 1 year of administrative or accounting-related experience (preferred)

  • Basic knowledge of accounts and bookkeeping will be an advantage

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook)

  • Able to work independently, with good organizational and time-management skills

  • Pleasant personality with a responsible and positive work attitude

  • Able to communicate in English; Mandarin and simple Malay are an advantage

  • Willing to work in the East/North area

📧 Interested candidates, please email your resume to:
eshsmd.recruitment@gmail.com

账户兼管理员（欢迎马来西亚人）

📍 北区工作

我们正在寻找一位细心、负责的账户兼行政人员，协助公司日常的会计及行政事务。

工作职责

  • 跟进未清发票，并协助准备供应商付款报告

  • 维护客户付款及收据的准确记录

  • 准备销售设计师的佣金索赔报告

  • 妥善归档及管理供应商发票、销售项目及付款文件

  • 协助基本会计及簿记相关工作

  • 处理一般行政事务，如文件整理及数据输入

  • 完成上级安排的其他临时行政工作

职位要求

  • 至少 1 年行政或会计相关工作经验（优先）

  • 具备基本会计及簿记知识者优先

  • 熟练使用 Microsoft Office（Excel、Word、Outlook）

  • 能独立完成工作，做事有条理

  • 性格开朗、态度积极、责任心强

  • 能以英语沟通；会华语及简单马来语者优先

  • 愿意在北区工作

📧 有意者请将简历发送至：
eshsmd.recruitment@gmail.com

postedCompany.description:
Meng Design is established since 1980 and registered under Housing & Development Board with a porfolio of satisfied  customers and their beautifully renovated homes.

We received accreditation from the revelant authorities on our ISO 9001 certification. At Meng Design we just don't strive to just renovate but to create a new atmosphere for everyone.

With a wide range of  designs and materials and highly skill workers at our showrooms & factory, our professional team and dedicated staff is always attentive to assist customers in their individual needs and requirements.

Meng Design & Build provides interior designs, space planning, conceptualise and furnishing services for home, offices and commercial.  At Meng Design, we provide a complete service from applying of renovation permits, bank loans and assisting customers to select suitable furnishings for their homes, thus giving the customers a peace of mind.
postedCompany.name: MENG DESIGN & BUILD
